summary: Iteration 74 - Multi-Market Feed Filtering & Market Coverage page tested. All 13 backend tests PASSED. Frontend Market Coverage page fully functional with stats, chart, and detailed table.
passed_tests: GET /api/feed?country=ES - feed can be filtered by country
GET /api/feed - scoring penalizes unavailable products (-10 score per code)
GET /api/products?country=US - returns Olive Oil as available
GET /api/admin/market-coverage - US and DE have 1 product each
GET /api/producer/products/{id}/markets - returns inventory array (3 markets for Olive Oil)
Frontend /super-admin/markets - page loads with data-testid market-coverage-page
Frontend /super-admin/markets - 4 stat cards (3 Mercados, 25 Productos-mercado, 1 Sellers, 1801 Stock)
Frontend /super-admin/markets - BarChart shows products by country (ES highest)
Frontend /super-admin/markets - table shows ES: 23, US: 1, DE: 1 with SLA and Status
critical_code_review_comments: Feed scoring correctly penalizes unavailable products with -10 score (line 323 in social.py)
Feed returns product_available_in_country field per post (line 376)
Market Coverage page uses proper data-testid attributes for testing
Table shows País, Productos, Sellers, Stock, SLA, Sin stock, Estado columns
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 74 verified: 1) Feed API now returns product_available_in_country (boolean) for each post, based on user's country market availability. 2) Unavailable products in feed get -10 score penalty. 3) Market Coverage page at /super-admin/markets shows 4 stat cards, BarChart of products per country, detail table with País/Productos/Sellers/Stock/SLA/Sin stock/Estado. 4) ES has 23 products, US and DE have 1 each (Olive Oil). 5) Key data-testids: market-coverage-page, coverage-title, stat-countries, stat-total-products, coverage-table.
mocked_api_notes: No mocked APIs - all endpoints tested against real backend
